name: governance-team
summary: Audit-first team for keeping governed repos aligned with Agent Forge contracts and portability rules.

roles.name: governor-auditor
roles.responsibility: Inspect repo governance state, registry alignment, adapter wiring, and required docs.
roles.stop_condition: All major governance findings are identified and categorized.

roles.name: portability-reviewer
roles.responsibility: Check for suitcase-doctrine and agent-agnostic portability drift.
roles.stop_condition: All portability-sensitive surfaces have been reviewed.

roles.name: remediation-planner
roles.responsibility: Turn findings into ordered remediation actions without mutating by default.
roles.stop_condition: A human can act on the remediation plan without re-interpreting it.
